entries.name: Vivid Blue
entries.notes: Bright, trustworthy blue (Google-style). Good for primary actions and links.

entries.name: Disket Mono
entries.notes: Geometric monospace with a technical, display feel. Strong for headers and labels.

entries.name: Srbija Sans
entries.notes: Clean humanist sans. Versatile for body and UI text.

entries.name: Dynamic Header with Intersection Observer
entries.notes: Observe a sentinel element near the top of the page; toggle a header class when it leaves/enters view to show/hide or restyle the header on scroll.

entries.name: React memo / useMemo / useCallback
entries.notes: Memoization decision notes: memo for components, useMemo for values, useCallback for stable function identity. Use to avoid needless re-renders.

entries.name: eslint-plugin-react
entries.notes: React-specific linting rules for ESLint. Baseline for catching React mistakes.

entries.name: TanStack Builder
entries.notes: Tooling from the TanStack ecosystem. Worth tracking for modern front-end building blocks.

entries.name: Design Systems (Smashing Magazine)
entries.notes: Ongoing reference category for design-system thinking and articles.

entries.name: Inverse (editorial design inspiration)
entries.notes: Editorial site saved for layout, type scale, and visual rhythm inspiration.
